description_for_human: Query Fabric IQ risk metrics, churn drivers, and retention KPIs.
description_for_model: Tools for enterprise risk analysis grounded in Microsoft Fabric IQ. Use for churn analysis, loss recovery metrics, portfolio risk scoring, retention trends, and governed write operations. Dashboard/table tools return Adaptive Card widgets rendered in Copilot chat.

functions.name: get_risk_dashboard
functions.description: Returns an interactive Adaptive Card dashboard with portfolio risk KPIs: ChurnRate, RetentionScore, NPLRatio, LossRecoveryRate, and high-risk account count.

segment.description: Portfolio segment filter: all, enterprise, smb, or high_risk

period.description: Reporting period: MTD, QTD, YTD, or L12M

functions.name: analyze_churn_drivers
functions.description: Analyzes and ranks top churn drivers from Fabric IQ ChurnDriverImpact measure, returning an Adaptive Card with impact bars and affected account counts.

segment.description: Portfolio segment: all, enterprise, smb, or high_risk

top_n.description: Number of top drivers to return, between 1 and 10

functions.name: get_loss_recovery_metrics
functions.description: Retrieves loss recovery rate, write-off ratio, and collection efficiency from Fabric IQ. Returns structured JSON with formatted percentages and USD amounts.

region.description: Geographic region filter: all, AMER, EMEA, or APAC

period.description: Reporting period: MTD, QTD, YTD, or L12M

functions.name: list_at_risk_accounts
functions.description: Lists customer accounts exceeding risk score thresholds. Returns an Adaptive Card table with account name, region, contract tenure, risk score, and churn probability.

min_risk_score.description: Minimum RiskScore threshold, 0 to 100. Accounts at or above this score are returned.

limit.description: Maximum number of accounts to return (default 10, max 50)

functions.name: get_retention_trend
functions.description: Shows 12-month retention and churn trend data compared to prior period. Returns an Adaptive Card table with monthly ChurnRate, LossRecoveryRate, and RetentionScore with traffic-light indicators.

region.description: Geographic region: all, AMER, EMEA, or APAC

period.description: Trend window: L12M (last 12 months) or YTD

functions.name: create_retention_task
functions.description: Creates a governed retention outreach task for an at-risk account. Requires Authorization bearer token with Retention.Write scope. In dev mode, auth check is bypassed.

account_id.description: Account ID to create the retention task for (e.g. ACC-1042)

notes.description: Optional notes or context for the retention team

functions.name: flag_account_risk_tier
functions.description: Updates the risk tier classification for an account. Governed write operation requiring Retention.Write scope. Tier changes are logged with justification for audit trail.

justification.description: Business justification for the tier change (audit trail)

tools.name: get_risk_dashboard
tools.description: Interactive Adaptive Card portfolio risk dashboard from Fabric IQ.

tools.name: analyze_churn_drivers
tools.description: Top churn drivers ranked by Fabric IQ ChurnDriverImpact.

tools.name: get_loss_recovery_metrics
tools.description: Loss recovery KPIs: rate, write-off ratio, collection efficiency.

tools.name: list_at_risk_accounts
tools.description: At-risk accounts table with risk score and churn probability.

tools.name: get_retention_trend
tools.description: 12-month churn and retention trend Adaptive Card.

tools.name: create_retention_task
tools.description: Create governed retention outreach task (write — dev bypass in mock mode).

tools.name: flag_account_risk_tier
tools.description: Flag account risk tier (write — dev bypass in mock mode).
